name: Fettucini & Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp To 1/2 tsp Hot pepper flakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large kettle of water to a boil and cook the pasta until it is al dente, about 10 to 12 minutes.
2. Drain the pasta in a colander and set aside.
3. Meanwhile, heat 1 teaspoon of oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add minced garlic and cook for about 1 minute.
4. Add mushrooms and cook for about 5 minutes until they are tender.
5. Stir in white wine, lemon juice, hot pepper flakes, and salt. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for about 10 minutes until the liquid has evaporated.
6. Stir in the remaining oil, pepper, and parsley. Remove from heat.
7. Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss with the sauce. Reheat over low heat until heated through.
